name: fake-or-real
description: The main task of this competition is to detect fake texts in a given dataset. Each data sample contains two texts - one real and one fake.

name: D-Schema
description: D-Schema is a versatile Python-based tool for connecting to databases, parsing their structure, and generating various schema definitions. It leverages SQLAlchemy for in-memory database representation, enabling flexible and extensible schema generation, including DDL. Designed for easy extension to support new schema types.

name: scripts
